analysis.reasoning: Core message: The EU claims climate leadership and urges international partners to pursue a green recovery from the COVID-19 crisis, framed under the European Green Deal and at an international forum. EU4: Positions the EU as a pioneer/leader on climate policy—explicitly stated (“ready to show climate leadership”)—so this applies. EU6: Calls on international partners and references global cooperation and greener recovery worldwide, showing the EU contributing to a better world; this aligns with promoting global cooperation and well-being. EU1: Not about history or past successes; no. EU2: No emphasis on internal EU unity; no. EU3: Not focused on benefits within the EU to citizens; no. EU5: Not about human rights/democracy specifically; no. Conclusion: EU4 and EU6.
